tracks.rawText: 4:20CAFFEINE DREAMS ☕ [2322663146]UploadIndie pop with a mid-tempo groove at 90 BPM in the key of G major, The arrangement features a clean, rhythmic electric guitar playing syncopated chords and a melodic lead line with a slight chorus effect, A prominent bass guitar follows the kick drum pattern with a warm, rounded tone, The drum kit uses a tight snare and a steady eighth-note hi-hat pattern, Male vocals are delivered in a smooth, soulful tenor with light reverb, A subtle acoustic guitar provides additional rhythmic texture in the background, The track maintains a consistent 4/4 time signature with a focus on the interplay between the vocal melody and the clean guitar riffs7PublishRemix
